testcase.classname: PersonaManagerAwareness.from resolves immediately when the manager slot is already present
testcase.name: PersonaManagerAwareness.from resolves immediately when the manager slot is already present

testcase.classname: PersonaManagerAwareness.personas reads the persona list from the manager slot
testcase.name: PersonaManagerAwareness.personas reads the persona list from the manager slot

testcase.classname: PersonaManagerAwareness.personas is empty when the slot has no personas
testcase.name: PersonaManagerAwareness.personas is empty when the slot has no personas

testcase.classname: PersonaAwareness.from reads a persona's slot via the option's client id
testcase.name: PersonaAwareness.from reads a persona's slot via the option's client id

testcase.classname: PersonaAwareness.from exposes the persona id from the option, even before the slot exists
testcase.name: PersonaAwareness.from exposes the persona id from the option, even before the slot exists

testcase.classname: PersonaAwareness.from falls back to safe defaults when the slot is absent
testcase.name: PersonaAwareness.from falls back to safe defaults when the slot is absent

testcase.classname: PersonaAwareness.from reads isWriting (message id) while the persona is streaming
testcase.name: PersonaAwareness.from reads isWriting (message id) while the persona is streaming

testcase.classname: the manager list + PersonaAwareness.from together resolves a persona by walking the published list
testcase.name: the manager list + PersonaAwareness.from together resolves a persona by walking the published list
